title: Search Result Card
description: Contract for a single search-result card rendered in the unified search UI. The result card is derived from a Typesense search hit (search/typesense_collection.schema.json) and adds presentation-layer fields (snippet HTML, type-aware secondary line, type icon). UI implementation MAY consume Typesense hits directly; this schema documents the canonical card shape for components.

id.description: Canonical PID. Card click navigates to /id/{namespace}/{slug}.

title.description: Primary card title, derived from prefLabel in the user's current UI language with fallback chain (TR → EN → AR → translit).

transliteration.description: ALA-LC transliteration shown as a subdued secondary on the title line, when prefLabel is non-Latin script.

secondary.description: Type-aware secondary line. Place: 'Settlement, in Bilād al-Shām'. Dynasty: 'Caliphate, 750-1258 CE'. Person: 'Scholar, Khurāsānī (d. 256/870)'. Work: 'Hadith collection by al-Bukhārī (d. 256/870)'. Manuscript: 'Codex, Süleymaniye 1825, 9th c. AH'. Event: 'Battle, Manzikert, 463 AH / 1071 CE'.

snippet.description: HTML-safe text snippet from the description field, with query terms wrapped in <mark> tags. ≤ 280 chars.

type_icon.description: Lucide icon name keyed by entity_type. UI maps: place→map-pin, dynasty→crown, person→user, work→book-open, manuscript→scroll, event→calendar.

score.description: Relevance score from Typesense (0..1 normalized for display).

facet_chips.description: Up to 3 facet chips on the card (e.g., 'Khurāsān', '8th c.', 'Bosworth'). Click expands the facet panel.

thumbnail_url.description: Optional thumbnail (manuscript: IIIF cover, place: static map preview, person: portrait if Wikidata has one).

deprecated.description: If true, card is rendered with strikethrough + 'See: <new entity>' redirect notice.
